name: EuiContextMenuPanel

size.description: Alters the size of the items and the title

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

initialFocusedItemIndex.description:
Determines the initially focused menu item for keyboard and screen reader users.

Can be set to `-1` to prevent autofocus (an uncommon case that must have
keyboard accessibility accounted for manually if used)

example: <EuiContextMenuPanel title="Context menu panel title">Context menu panel title</EuiContextMenuPanel>
